summary: Stock Finder feature (backend SSE endpoint + frontend modal wiring) tested end-to-end. Backend pytest: 11/11 PASSED (cap=large 40 stocks, cap=mid 39 stocks, schema/direction/headers all verified). Frontend Playwright: Finder button visible in AutoScanner header, modal opens with all controls, scan streams results, stop button halts streaming, alphabetical sort default confirmed (Adani, Asian Paints, Bharti Airtel, ...), direction filter works (5 BUY + 9 SELL = 14 ALL), clicking row closes modal AND loads selected ticker on chart (ADANIENT confirmed). Regression: scanner-toggle START/STOP and Paper Trading panel both functional.

ui_bugs.issue: Pre-existing console error 'TypeError: chart.addPriceLine is not a function' repeats on every chart load (also reported in iteration_6). Not introduced by this iteration.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/stock-finder/scan?cap=large returns 200 with text/event-stream content-type
Backend: cap=large emits exactly 40 progress events + 1 done event
Backend: done.total_scanned == 40 for cap=large, == 39 for cap=mid
Backend: each event is valid JSON with no NaN/Infinity leakage
Backend: best_direction is always 'BUY' or 'SELL' (never WAIT/NEUTRAL)
Backend: cap filter correctly restricts result cap field to requested slice
Backend: SSE headers include Cache-Control no-cache
Frontend: 'Finder' button visible in AutoScanner header (testid open-stock-finder)
Frontend: Clicking Finder opens modal with cap-filter-{all,large,mid,small}, start-stock-finder, close-finder testids all present
Frontend: Scan streams results — 14 rows received with cap=large filter
Frontend: Stop Scan button halts streaming (row count stable after stop)

Frontend: Default sort is alphabetical by name ascending — verified (Adani Enterprises, Asian Paints, Bharti Airtel, Coal India, HCL Technologies, HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, ITC, ONGC, Reliance Industries)
Frontend: Direction filter ALL=14, BUY=5, SELL=9 (sums match)
Frontend: Clicking finder row closes modal AND loads ticker (ADANIENT verified on chart + toast 'Loaded 1D (yfinance) for ADANIENT')
Regression: scanner-toggle still works (START -> STOP transition)
Regression: PAPER tab and paper-trading-panel still load
action_items: (Carry-over) Fix pre-existing chart.addPriceLine TypeError in ChartPanel — lightweight-charts API mismatch, should use series.createPriceLine() not chart.addPriceLine().
critical_code_review_comments: Stop Scan UX: when user clicks Stop, in-flight batch (up to 15 concurrent stocks) still completes and emits rows because EventSource is closed client-side but server doesn't detect disconnect immediately. Test saw rows go from 7→14 after Stop. Acceptable but consider checking request.is_disconnected() inside event_stream() loop to abort server-side.
_stock_finder_executor is a module-global ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=15) never shut down — fine for long-running server but should be closed on app shutdown event.
_scan_stock_for_finder runs yf.Ticker().history() synchronously per stock; batching helps but consider caching daily bars (TTL ~5min) to avoid hammering Yahoo for repeat scans.

Tie-break in best_direction: 'BUY if buy_ct >= sell_ct else SELL' — when counts are equal, defaults to BUY, which may bias results. Consider falling back to highest-confidence signal direction instead.
Frontend StockFinderModal.jsx (415 lines) — getting close to 700-line guideline; consider extracting ResultRow + ProgressBar + filter controls into separate files for maintainability.
_UNIVERSE_COUNT = 113 in StockFinderModal is hardcoded but actual backend universe is 120 (40+39+41). Mismatch in empty-state copy text.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stock Finder fully verified iteration_7. Backend SSE test file: /app/backend/tests/test_stock_finder.py (11 tests). Key selectors: open-stock-finder (Finder btn in AutoScanner), cap-filter-{all,large,mid,small}, start-stock-finder (acts as Start/Stop/Rescan toggle), close-finder, finder-row-{SYMBOL}, dir-filter-{ALL,BUY,SELL}, finder-search. Universe split: large=40, mid=39, small=41, total=120. Note _UNIVERSE_COUNT placeholder in StockFinderModal.jsx (line 412) hardcoded to 113 — minor copy bug.
